symbolId.description: Canonical (`method:NS.T.M(P)`), qualified, or short name of the target method or constructor whose call sites are reported.

moduleScope.description: Optional. Restrict discovered call sites to this module/asmdef.

excludeTests.description: Drop call sites whose containing symbol is in a Test path bucket. Default false.

maxSites.description: Optional. Cap on call sites returned in `sites[]`; defaults to 256. Zero / negative values clamp to the default. The `parameterSummaries[]` histogram still counts every discovered site.

profileScope.description: Optional. Define profile to scope IOperation extraction to. Currently must match the retained profile. INV-MULTI-DEFINE-IOP-001.
